extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz won Stage 21 ITT by catching and passing IMAS Enric in final 200m, securing fourth stage win and overall by 4:42.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC Primoz caught IMAS Enric in final 200m sprint despite leading GC by 4:42, revealing championship-level competitive hunger.
CORT Magnus paced aggressively through first two splits but faded final kilometers, losing 14 seconds and stage win.
Jumbo-Visma rode more prudently throughout 2021 Vuelta than recent Grand Tours, suggesting tactical evolution beyond pure power.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Full sprint for stage win in final 200m despite comfortable 4:42 GC advantage shows exceptional competitive mindset
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Led ITT for 90 minutes with aggressive early pacing, only 14 seconds from victory on climbing time trial
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: Held second overall by 4:42, fought full sprint to line despite ROGLIC catching him in final meters
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: Final race at age 31 after four years of declining results from former Vuelta winner and Giro podium finisher
